ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transects" (
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transect */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the transect */,
  "geographical_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the transect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transect */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the transect was created */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the transect was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transect (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team responsible for the transect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transect the measurement belongs to */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage value for the measurement */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the measurement */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the measurement */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value for the measurement */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was collected */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who collected the measurement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_transect_id FOREIGN KEY ("transect_id") REFERENCES transects ("transect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the researcher's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the researcher's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the team was last updated */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the researcher joined the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the researcher left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the data type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual value of the measurement */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the data value was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data value (e.g., field, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the database */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
